attributes.title: [Ticura] Critical-risk indicators in EU
attributes.description: All Ticura indicators with severity >= 80 attributed to an EU member state, currently active.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter": [], "query": {"language": "kuery", "query": "event.module:\"ti_ticura\" and event.severity >= 80 and labels.is_ioc_transform_source:false and (threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"AT\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"BE\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"BG\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"HR\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"CY\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"CZ\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"DK\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"EE\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"FI\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"FR\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"DE\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"GR\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"HU\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"IE\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"IT\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"LV\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"LT\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"LU\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"MT\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"NL\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"PL\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"PT\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"RO\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"SK\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"SI\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"ES\" or threat.indicator.geo.country_iso_code:\"SE\")"}, "indexRefName": "kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
